goal.name: HUMANOID_ROBOT
goal.note: Owner-editable. R1 ~ 6000 USD entry option; G1 EDU ~ 40000; H1 ~ 90000.

lane_a_personal.note: Owner sets amount. Must survive forex earning 0. Manual entries recorded to ledger by owner action.

activation_requires: real demo track record (30+ trades, 2+ walk-forward windows, <=14d fresh)
lane_b_forex_verified.note: Stays disabled and 0 USD until live is legitimately armed and profitable. No autonomous money movement ever - alert-and-instruct only.

drip_bucket.behavior: every verified deposit drips into the bucket; when the bucket reaches bucket_size_usd it TIPS: total moves to the fund ledger and a BUCKET_TIP alert fires with the running fund total and percent-to-target
drip_bucket.note: Same pattern as the forex profit tipping bucket (min_profit_to_sweep_usd=200 in atm_milestone_config.json) - one mental model everywhere.

milestones.behavior: crossing each percent fires a JACKPOT alert; 100 percent = humanoid purchase decision alert (owner buys, never automation)

alerts.topics_ref: control/secrets/humanoid_ntfy_topics.json (gitignored - topic name is the access key, never commit it)

DRIP.tone_design: silent or default - no noise for routine drips

BUCKET_TIP.tone_design: MONEY COUNTER - bill-counter shuffle whirr ending in double high-pitch beep (counting complete, payout decision ready)

JACKPOT_MILESTONE.tone_design: CASINO JACKPOT - slot machine coin cascade plus fanfare (milestone crossed)

alerts.note: ntfy Android assigns a custom sound PER TOPIC on the phone (Settings > Subscribed topic > Notification sound). Owner downloads a money-counter mp3 and a jackpot mp3 once and binds them; see docs/finance/HUMANOID_FUND_AND_ALERT_TONES.md.

note: Tracking and alerting only. This config never moves money. Owner performs every transfer and the purchase.
attested_by_owner: Anthony, 2026-07-01 (structure approved; lane A amount and topic names pending owner fill-in)
